name: process_near_miss_investigation_step5
description: Analyze safety barriers in the near-miss incident

barrier_analysis.description: Analysis of safety barriers that failed, succeeded, or were missing
barrier_analysis.reasoning: Identifies effectiveness and gaps in safety barrier systems

failed.description: Safety barriers that failed to prevent or mitigate the incident
failed.reasoning: Identifies barriers that need improvement or replacement

successful.description: Safety barriers that worked as intended
successful.reasoning: Identifies effective barriers that prevented escalation

missing.description: Safety barriers that should have been in place
missing.reasoning: Identifies gaps in the barrier system that need to be addressed

reasoning.description: Detailed explanation of barrier analysis findings
reasoning.reasoning: Documents the thought process behind barrier identification and assessment
